ability: 你不能提交咒语。每个夜晚，你会得知你的对立阵营提交的一条被施放的咒语：你可以选择将它变为哑咒，随后所有玩家会得知此事。
otherNightReminder: Tell the Skeptic the full text of a Spell that was cast today by a player opposite their alignment, then ask the Skeptic if they'd like to un-cast it. If yes, place the "Un-Cast" token on the caster and publicly announce that the Skeptic has un-cast a spell.
